data.body: Completion verification after merged Gerrit 899 FAILED with 8 unmet criteria; ticket remains in_progress. Required continuation: add the exact named structural/signal-chain/exhaustion/batching/index-domain tests; implement comparative baseline_recall/baseline_false_accept gating; replace the placeholder nested baseline with atomic scalar metadata including model/corpus_digest/recorded_at; build the required 8+ scenario gold corpus and exercise the focused finder; and add batch with_inputs / preloaded relation-snapshot seam coverage. The verifier output is the authoritative gap list. A new continuation change will be created from current origin/main; merged 899 remains regression-safe (local 6951 pass, CI +1, LLM +1).
